skill.name: referral-program
skill.description: Design, optimize, and analyze referral programs, affiliate programs, and word-of-mouth growth loops.
skill.summary: Build practical referral and affiliate programs with incentives, metrics, fraud controls, and launch plans.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer flagged Markdown code fences, formulas, and marketing terms as command execution, weak cryptography, and reconnaissance. Manual review found no executable scripts, no shell commands, no network requests, no prompt injection, and no malicious intent. Low risk remains because the skill discusses third-party referral tools and tracking practices that users should review for privacy and compliance.

low_findings.title: Static Analysis Findings Are False Positives
low_findings.description: The reported backtick execution locations are Markdown diagrams, formulas, and outreach templates, not Ruby or shell execution. The reported weak cryptography and reconnaissance hits are ordinary referral-program terms and fraud-prevention discussion, not cryptographic code or probing logic.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines are visible Markdown content and contain no executable language runtime, subprocess calls, or network operations. The only file is SKILL.md, so there is no hidden implementation file in the scanned set.

low_findings.title: Privacy Review Needed for Tracking Guidance
low_findings.description: The skill recommends referral tracking, device fingerprinting, IP address monitoring, and third-party referral platforms. These are legitimate fraud and attribution controls, but users should apply privacy, consent, and data retention review before implementation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The skill directly advises tracking and fraud-prevention methods that can involve personal data. The guidance is contextual and legitimate, so the concern is compliance and governance rather than malicious behavior.

content.value_statement: Referral programs often fail because incentives, tracking, and launch timing are unclear. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code design practical programs with metrics, fraud controls, and launch plans.
actual_capabilities: Compares customer referral, affiliate, and hybrid program models.
Designs incentive structures using LTV, margin, CAC, and conversion goals.
Explains referral loops, trigger moments, share mechanisms, and launch sequencing.
Calculates viral coefficient, referral rate, referral ROI, and cohort metrics.
Outlines affiliate recruitment, enablement assets, and commission structures.
Lists fraud prevention controls, dashboard metrics, and post-launch optimization tests.
limitations: Does not include executable tracking code or platform integrations.
Does not replace legal review for affiliate terms, privacy, or tax rules.
Requires user-provided business metrics for accurate incentive sizing.
Platform recommendations may need current pricing and feature verification.

use_cases.title: Launch a Customer Referral Program
use_cases.description: Create a double-sided referral offer, define sharing moments, and plan the first 30 days after launch.

use_cases.title: Design an Affiliate Program
use_cases.description: Set commission terms, recruit partners, and prepare enablement materials for creators or consultants.

use_cases.title: Improve Referral Performance
use_cases.description: Diagnose low share rates, weak conversion, fraud risk, and unclear ROI using structured metrics.

prompt_templates.title: Choose a Program Type
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me decide whether to build a customer referral program, an affiliate program, or both. My product is [product], customers are [audience], LTV is [amount], and CAC is [amount].

prompt_templates.title: Design Referral Incentives
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a referral incentive structure for [business]. Use LTV, gross margin, CAC, product type, and likely referral motivation to recommend reward size and timing.

prompt_templates.title: Build an Affiliate Launch Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an affiliate program launch plan for [product]. Include commission structure, partner profile, outreach messaging, enablement assets, tracking needs, and success metrics.

prompt_templates.title: Audit Referral Program Performance
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit my referral program using these metrics: referral rate [value], invites per referrer [value], conversion rate [value], reward cost [value], and referred customer LTV [value]. Recommend tests and fixes.

output_examples.input: We sell a B2B SaaS tool with $2,400 LTV and $600 CAC. Create a referral incentive.
output_examples.output: A suitable plan would use a double-sided reward, such as account credit for the referrer and a first-month discount for the referred user. The maximum reward should stay below the margin-adjusted LTV minus target CAC. The rollout should test reward amount, prompt timing, and referred-user landing page copy.

output_examples.input: Our affiliate program has signups but few paid conversions.
output_examples.output: The review would check partner fit, landing page message match, cookie duration, demo access, and qualification rules. Likely next tests include better partner enablement, stronger comparison content, and a clearer conversion milestone for commission approval.

output_examples.input: We need a launch checklist for a referral program.
output_examples.output: The checklist would cover goals, incentive rules, referral links, landing pages, email templates, attribution tracking, fraud controls, terms, support training, launch messaging, and first-month monitoring.

best_practices: Base rewards on LTV, margin, CAC, and payback period.
Ask for referrals at moments when customers have just received value.
Track referred customers separately from other acquisition channels.
anti_patterns: Do not copy a famous referral program without checking product fit.
Do not launch rewards without fraud controls and clear terms.
Do not optimize only for invite volume without measuring conversion and LTV.

faq.question: Can this skill create a full referral program strategy?
faq.answer: Yes. It can outline program type, incentives, sharing flow, launch plan, metrics, and optimization steps.

faq.question: Does this skill implement referral tracking code?
faq.answer: No. It provides strategy, formulas, checklists, and planning guidance, not executable integrations.

faq.question: Can it help with affiliate commission design?
faq.answer: Yes. It compares percentage, flat-fee, recurring, and tiered commission structures.

faq.question: What information should I provide first?
faq.answer: Provide program type, audience, LTV, CAC, margin, current referral rate, tools, and reward budget.

faq.question: Does it address referral fraud?
faq.answer: Yes. It covers verification, delayed payouts, limits, suspicious pattern review, and reward clawbacks.

faq.question: Can this skill compare referral tools?
faq.answer: Yes. It lists tool categories and selection criteria, but current pricing should be verified separately.
